title: An 11th-Hour Deal
summary_full: The U.S. and Iran reached a two-week cease-fire agreement, hours after President Trump threatened to wipe out a “whole civilization.”
summary_public: The U.S. and Iran reached a two-week cease-fire agreement, hours after President Trump threatened to wipe out a “whole civilization.”

IR.label: positive
IR.evidence: Iran reached a two-week cease-fire agreement
